errors.Active_Command_Cooldown_Descripti.en-GB: This command is currently under a cooldown. Please try again in <t:{time}:R>

errors.Collector_Timeout_Description.en-GB: The interaction collector for this message has timed out. Please try again and select an option within {time}.
